tools.name: DIGI LINE SHEET
tools.title: Digital Line Sheet and SKU Selection Tool | cloonk
tools.description: Review replenishment assortments, filter and annotate product SKUs, attach imagery, select styles, and export merchandising decisions to Excel.

tools.name: Assortment Comparison
tools.title: Assortment Comparison Tool for Retail Merchandising | cloonk
tools.description: Compare retailer assortments by style, color, grid, brand, units, and overlap in a private browser-based merchandising workspace.

tools.name: Retail Door Tracker
tools.title: Retail Door Tracker and Distribution Mapping Tool | cloonk
tools.description: Track brand distribution by retailer and physical door with matrix views, store maps, assignment workflows, change history, and restore points.

tools.name: Retail Data Standardizer
tools.title: Retail Sales Data Standardizer and Spreadsheet Mapper | cloonk
tools.description: Map, clean, normalize, pivot, and export recurring retailer sales and inventory spreadsheets into consistent analytics-ready datasets.

tools.name: Selling Analysis
tools.title: Retail Selling Analysis and Sell-Through Diagnostic | cloonk
tools.description: Diagnose retail sell-through, inventory health, velocity, momentum, promotional dependence, liquidation risk, and collection themes from Excel data.

tools.name: UPC Concat
tools.title: UPC Product Data Mapping and Schema Consolidation Tool | cloonk
tools.description: Join product records across Excel and CSV files, map fields into a canonical schema, resolve concatenated descriptions, and export clean product data.

tools.name: Image Prep
tools.title: Batch Product Image Resizer and Format Converter | cloonk
tools.description: Resize product images in batches, add backgrounds behind transparency, and convert files to PNG, JPEG, or WebP privately in your browser.
